creator: takamune@avrl.mei.co.jp
text:
Please apply this patch to upgrade port (of which I'm the maintainer).

Changes:
  - Updates japanese/bookview for the latest version 2.4.3.
  - No files have been added or removed.
  - Makefile, pkg/PLIST
	o Don't concern about creating ${PREFIX}/info/dir.
	   (It will be automatically created by 'bsd.port.mk'.)
